meta.title: BabeL-O — A terminal-native AI coding agent that stays alive

tokens.name: bg
usage:
/* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Dynamic style tokens. These custom properties are the single source of
   truth for the whole palette; toggling [data-theme] flips them, and JS also
   writes a live --scroll progress variable here at runtime.
   ------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
:root

tokens.name: c-red
usage:
/* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Dynamic style tokens. These custom properties are the single source of
   truth for the whole palette; toggling [data-theme] flips them, and JS also
   writes a live --scroll progress variable here at runtime.
   ------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
:root

/* cycle icon hues across the feature grid so the band is visible, not uniform */
.feat:nth-child(4n+1)

/* warm hue bloom behind the dark architecture card: red->purple glow low in the stack */
.arch::before

tokens.name: grad-text
usage:
/* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

tokens.name: grad-band
usage:
/* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Dynamic style tokens. These custom properties are the single source of
   truth for the whole palette; toggling [data-theme] flips them, and JS also
   writes a live --scroll progress variable here at runtime.
   ------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
:root

/* =========================================================================
   7b. HUE BAND - Ideogram-style tonal transition (cream -> peach -> lilac).
   A full-bleed gradient strip that carries the eye from the warm hero into the
   cooler feature section, with a single anchored line of copy.
   ========================================================================= */
.hueband

gradients.value:
radial-gradient(40% 55% at 78% 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-orange) 26%, transparent), transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(38% 50% at 92% 22%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-pink) 22%, transparent), transparent 72%),
    radial-gradient(42% 60% at 12% 30%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-purple) 16%, transparent), transparent 72%)

radial-gradient(50% 70% at 85% 20%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-pink) 22%, transparent), transparent 70%),
  radial-gradient(45% 70% at 12% 85%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-purple) 18%, transparent), transparent 70%)

radial-gradient(50% 70% at 20% 100%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-red) 30%, transparent), transparent 70%),
             radial-gradient(45% 70% at 80% 100%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--c-purple) 34%, transparent), transparent 70%)
